svg.content: <mxfile host="Electron" agent="Mozilla/5.0 (X11; Linux x86_64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) draw.io/26.2.15 Chrome/134.0.6998.205 Electron/35.2.1 Safari/537.36" version="26.2.15" scale="1" border="0"> <diagram name="Page-1" id="rkVP00Y97kWzAWfL26VR"> <mxGraphModel dx="970" dy="596" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="400" pageHeight="900" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="0wFDT72frzDaK2xCjBbW-3" value="" style="ellipse;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=none;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="80" y="160" width="430" height="190" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="0wFDT72frzDaK2xCjBbW-1" value="<font style="font-size: 16px;">异常 (Exception)</font><div><font style="font-size: 16px;">=&nbsp;</font><span style="font-size: 16px; background-color: transparent; color: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255));">内部中断</span></div>" style="ellipse;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;aspect=fixed;fillColor=none;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="130" y="195" width="130" height="130" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="0wFDT72frzDaK2xCjBbW-2" value="<span style="font-size: 16px;">外部中断</span>" style="ellipse;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;aspect=fixed;fillColor=none;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="325" y="195" width="130" height="130" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="0wFDT72frzDaK2xCjBbW-4" value="<font style="font-size: 16px;">中断</font><div><font style="font-size: 16px;">(Interrupt)</font></div>" style="text;html=1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=0;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="230" y="170" width="130" height="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
